en_body:
But the rows of park trees
But the lampposts of the street
But the flowers breathing fragrance into night-dew...

: Bless the familiar one whose feet wander here
Bless the stranger finding the way home
And the raindrops of the world
sparkling with starlight beyond the sky
: Bless you with songs of Love
Bless you with a soul of amorous Poetry
mystical as the color of eyes
And joyous as a smile:
Bless You—Poet of Love, tender-hearted..!!

(First-Pen Poem, 19/01, Year of the Goat, that is
 7:15 PM, 19/03/2003, Louisiana, USA)
note: The opening date follows the Vietnamese lunar calendar's Quý Mùi year, corresponding here to March 19, 2003.
